Post: My mom sued me and my baby had cancer
In the last 12 months I have really been a tough go of things.  Almost exactly 1 year ago I was served legal papers by my estranged mother.  She was suing me over a small inheritance my father left me 10 years ago.   Then a couple weeks later I found out I was pregnant.  My partner of 4 years and father to our 2 yo told me he wanted me to get an abortion and move out.   He carried a genetic mutation so I decided like with my son, to get genetic testing by way of CVS at 11 weeks.  We found out that the baby would be born with retinoblastoma.  I was devastated but didn't know what to do.   Would I raise the baby as a single mom? My partners mom was born with retinoblastoma and went blind.  She went on to have 4 children with it and 2 of them died in their 20s and early 30s from complications of it.   At 22 weeks I had a termination which was on my birthday.   It was horrible and I am haunted by it every day.  When he found out the baby girl had cancer he said he wanted to now keep it but by then the trust was broken.  I felt so upset that my fiance and father to my child would kick me out pregnant and want to abort.  But then magically change his mind.  I would have had to deliver early by 4 weeks and the baby would have undergone daily cancer treatments in a different city for 3 months.  I was very overwhelmed with not knowing what to do.  Plus onto of that my estranged mother sued me.  It ended up costing me $40 000 in legal fees but I sat in court on the witness stand and provided testimony.  It was so hard.  She had abused me my entire life and it wasnt until I had my son that I realized I didn't want her near him and had to cut her out.  She was so mad she did everything she could to punish me.  Including suing me.  I was so scared.  But in the end I won.  I stood up against her and she lost the lawsuit.   But now it's been a year and I was recently diagnosed with generalized anxiety disorder and derealization (which I have had for 15 years due to being around my abusive mother).   Tomorrow I start EMDR therapy and CBT course for 8 weeks.  Then I start my DBT program for 32 weeks. I am still with my partner but I am so scared to leave him  I love him even though he doesnt seem to treat me right.  I have no family anymore other than my son and I am really struggling.  I feel like I have lost everything really except my son but really, I see myself turning into my mother anyway and that scares me.  I want a better mother for him but I am not a strong person with no support.  Every day I regret my decision to terminate but I thought I could not do it alone.  I feel so scared to do anything.  If I am honest, I really just want to die.  I want to lie down and never wake up.   I just can't live with this pain

input: Post: I am high functioning and self-sacrificing so it feels like no one notices that I am a disaster screaming for help in an echo chamber. When it comes to my loved ones, I will do anything and everything in my power to make sure they feel loved and supported. I will jump through hoops to make their days better. I will notice even the slightest change in them and will go out on a limb for them to be happy even if it means it might slight myself. Anything for them. I listen to their problems that vary from mental illnesses, addiction to heartache etc. I make them feel heard, like someone gives a shit about them.   However when it comes to myself.. I feel alone. I feel really, really alone. It feels like no gives a shit that I am hurting or that I am falling apart. When it comes to my own mental illness, it’s completely swept under the rug until I show behaviours they don’t like and then it becomes my “excuse”. When it comes to my addiction, it’s not acknowledged. It’s forgotten that I once spent all my days slipping down that bottle and doing everything in my power to numb myself. That I still fight the urge to rush into my cupboards and numb myself with the drugs I have there. Xanax, Ativan, Klonopin. To go to the liquor store and drink again. Maybe even mix the two. Anything to not feel this way. I slipped the other day and mixed an excessive amount of liquor and benzos to numb myself. My history of self harm is forgotten, and so is the tango I have danced with trying to kill my self which landed me in the hospital more times than I can count or how I have used food to torture my body. Abstaining or purging. The only form of control. I have managed to starve myself enough to lose 35 pounds in a couple of months. They encourage and congratulate my progress with cutting off toxic friends, family and even my SO but fail to be there when I need a hand. Fail to see when I’m drowning. Fail to see when I’m hurting. Fail to see that I’m about to fall off the deep end for good.   I’ve been high functioning for a long time,  and that may be the reason no one seems to bat an eye to my struggles. Even if they do see that I’m sad or hurt, they don’t acknowledge it and hope it goes away. I take my pills like I’m supposed to and go to my doctor’s visits so does that make me seem sane? I used to cry all the time but I was told my tears were manipulative so now I just... don’t? If you don’t cry, does that mean you shouldn’t be taken seriously? I don’t understand.   I keep ending back in this place and realization, that no matter what you do, you will be inevitably alone because no one will care about you the same way you do for them.  All I can think about is killing myself and I don’t know how to make it stop. The only I I haven’t is because I don’t want to leave my children without a parent. I just want it all to stop. I keep screaming in an echo chamber for everything to stop.

I was there for her during her coming out as a lesbian and every obstacle that came her way, and continually picked her side when my ex would try to be rude towards her or make me cut her off because he was threatened by her. She moved away to another city for a few months in the summertime.  Recently Julia started dating a girl named Alicia. At the time she was still living in a different city and Alicia lived here. Julia encouraged Alicia and I to be best friends too so I started hanging out with Alicia. At first it was hunky dory and I felt really good, I had two best friends that wanted to hangout or Julia would call all the time and it was a good friend group.   Until it wasn’t. Julia ended up moving to our city and everything changed. Suddenly BOTH Julia and Alicia barely talk to me and barely want to hangout. Julia has expressed to me that she’s going through depression so I tried to be forgiving of it and try to understand from a viewpoint of someone who also suffers from mental illness.   However it’s reached a ridiculous point. I have to push for a response from her, and when I am with her she is weirdly passive aggressive towards me (for example: I threw her a huge surprise party and spent over $200 on her and she keeps going off about how I wouldn’t let her do party drugs in my house) and when I talk about my problems she looks annoyed or uninterested. However she can call me crying or go off about her problems for long periods of time where I actively listen and give feedback. I will always do little favours for her and I feel unappreciated. (Example: I was driving her and Alicia to her car and she turned up the music in my car to shut me and her girlfriend up when we were talking. ) It feels like nothing I do is good enough for her.   I understand that there is a honeymoon and sometimes isolation stage with new relationships but I’m not sure if that is the case or if it is depression. She only wants to spend time with her girlfriend. She expressed fears of losing her friends from being with her girlfriend too much but continues to stay distant from me and others. I sort of feel used by both of them and like I was a filler friend until they had each other.   I was wondering if I should ask her if I have done something to bother her to make her act this way or voice my feelings? Or if I should leave it alone?   TLDR: Best friend and I were really close.
